task.summary: CLI Tool: parse function returns string instead of int
task.description: Fix parse function return type in cmd/commands/parse.go to use proper exit codes.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "edit_description": "Update parse.go to use 'exit(1)' for failure and 'exit(0)' for success, ensuring consistent exit codes per Go standard.",
  "target_files": ["cmd/commands/parse.go"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/return.*:.*return.*exit(0)/return.*:.*exit(0)/' cmd/commands/parse.go",
    "sed -i 's/return.*:.*return.*exit(1)/return.*:.*exit(1)/' cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'exit(0)' cmd/commands/parse.go && echo 'PASS: exit(0) used for success'",
    "grep -q 'exit(1)' cmd/commands/parse.go && echo 'PASS: exit(1) used for failure'",
    "grep -q 'exit(0)' cmd/commands/parse.go && echo 'PASS: exit(0) used for success'"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Parse function now returns exit(0) on success and exit(1) on failure, adhering to Go's standard exit codes.",
  "risk_notes": "None",
  "follow_up_type": "none"
}
